hooks.command: bash -c 'PLUGIN_DIR="$HOME/.claude/plugins/local/devops-ssh"; if [ ! -f "$PLUGIN_DIR/.claude-plugin/plugin.json" ]; then echo "{\"continue\": true, \"systemMessage\": \"[Auto-Setup] Plugin not installed. Run: bash setup-claude.sh from project root to install skills, hooks, memory, and SQLite.\"}"; else echo "{\"continue\": true, \"suppressOutput\": true}"; fi'
